# create-express-forge

> CLI to scaffold production-ready Express.js TypeScript backends

## Repository

- GitHub: https://github.com/CODE-Y02/create-express-forge
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/create-express-forge

## Package Manager

pnpm@9 with Turborepo

## Published Packages

- `create-express-forge` — The CLI scaffolder

## Key Files

- ARCHITECTURE.md — Full architecture documentation
- AGENTS.md — AI agent instructions
- CONTRIBUTING.md — How to contribute
- packages/create-express-forge/src/types.ts — All CLI option types
- packages/create-express-forge/src/generator/index.ts — Generator orchestrator

## What It Generates

Express.js + TypeScript backends with:
Zod env validation, centralized error handling, request validation middleware,
ApiError class, ApiResponse helpers, asyncHandler, helmet, cors, rate limiter,
graceful shutdown, optional Prisma/Sequelize ORM, Winston/Pino logger,
Vitest/Jest testing, Docker + docker-compose
